mapper.select: SELECT r.id as "id", r.type as "type", r.quantity as "quantity", r.date_time as "date_time", r.operator as "operator", r.applicant as "applicant", r.remark as "remark", c.type as "consumableName" FROM bus_consumable_record_archive r LEFT JOIN bus_consumable c ON r.consumable_id = c.id WHERE r.archived_at = #{archivedTime} ORDER BY r.date_time DESC
